inspired.name: Inspired
inspired.description: After a team member uses a status move, gain 1 Strength and 1 Swiftness.

sadistic.name: Sadistic
sadistic.description: For each negative effect an enemy gets, gains that much Strength for 1 turn.

determination.name: Determination
determination.description: Has 2 Strength while at full Health.

underdog.name: Underdog
underdog.description: Has 1 Strength for every extra Danger Level the opposing enemy has compared to this creature.

team_spirit.name: Team Spirit
team_spirit.description: When an ally is placed, gain 1 Strength.

cold_blooded.name: Cold-Blooded
cold_blooded.description: For each Slowness this has, it also has 1 Strength.

fast_predator.name: Fast Predator
fast_predator.description: For every Swiftness this has, it also has Strength.

fume_sniffer.name: Fume Sniffer
fume_sniffer.description: Has 1 Strength and 1 Swiftness for each creature that has Poison, including itself.

hot_blooded.name: Hot-Blooded
hot_blooded.description: When placed, gains 2 Strength for 1 turn.

galvanizing.name: Galvanizing
galvanizing.description: When placed and on retreat, gives 1 Strength to its allies for 1 turn.

apex_predator.name: Apex Predator
apex_predator.description: On kill, gain 1 Swiftness and 1 Strength.

rat_king.name: Rat King
rat_king.description: Allies of Danger Level 1 have 4 Strength.

vengeful.name: Vengeful
vengeful.description: When an ally dies, gains 2 Strength.

adrenaline.name: Adrenaline
adrenaline.description: Has 3 Strength when at 2 Health or less.

ever_growing.name: Ever-Growing
ever_growing.description: At the end of each turn, gains 1 Strength.

deimatic.name: Deimatic
deimatic.description: When placed, inflicts 2 Weakness to the opposing enemy for 1 turn.

crippling_disease.name: Crippling Disease
crippling_disease.description: If the opposing enemy has Poison, it also has 2 Weakness.

dreadful.name: Dreadful
dreadful.description: At the end of each turn, inflicts 1 Weakness to the opposing enemy.

frightening.name: Frightening
frightening.description: When placed, inflicts 1 Weakness for 1 turn to all enemies.

tail_shelter.name: Tail Shelter
tail_shelter.description: Has 2 Sturdy. Disappears after using a move.

snow_cover.name: Snow Cover
snow_cover.description: Has 2 Sturdy if the opposing enemy has Slowness.

passive_aggressive.name: Passive Aggressive
passive_aggressive.description: Every turn, alternate between having 2 Swiftness and 1 Sturdy.

hard_headed.name: Hard-Headed
hard_headed.description: When placed, gains 2 Sturdy for 1 turn.

lucid.name: Lucid
lucid.description: Has 2 Sturdy if the opposing enemy has Torpidity.

force_field.name: Force Field
force_field.description: When placed, gives 1 Sturdy to its team for 1 turn.

glow_mark.name: Glow Mark
glow_mark.description: After this attacks, inflict 1 Vulnerable to the target.

tracker.name: Tracker
tracker.description: When placed, inflicts 1 Vulnerable to the opposing enemy.

icebreaker.name: Icebreaker
icebreaker.description: Enemies with Slowness have that much Vulnerable.

blinding_radiance.name: Blinding Radiance
blinding_radiance.description: When an enemy takes damage, inflicts 1 Vulnerable to it for 1 turn.

assailant.name: Assailant
assailant.description: When placed, inflicts 1 damage and 1 Vulnerable to the opposing enemy.

harsh_frequency.name: Harsh Frequency
harsh_frequency.description: Enemies with Detected have that much Vulnerable.

rush.name: Rush
rush.description: When placed, gains 3 Swiftness for 1 turn.

turbo.name: Turbo
turbo.description: At the end of the turn, gain 1 Swiftness.

positive_feedback.name: Positive Feedback
positive_feedback.description: When an ally gets healed, gains 1 Swiftness.

ice_wall.name: Ice Wall
ice_wall.description: When the opposing enemy receives Slowness, gains that much Armor.

frigid.name: Frigid
frigid.description: Deals double damage to creatures that have Slowness.

sticky_goo.name: Sticky Goo
sticky_goo.description: When an enemy takes damage, inflicts 1 Slowness to it.

strength_sucker.name: Strength Sucker
strength_sucker.description: When dealing damage, inflicts 2 Slowness to the victim.

reflexive_sting.name: Reflexive Sting
reflexive_sting.description: When an enemy receives Slowness, inflict 2 Poison to it.

inkstain.name: Inkstain
inkstain.description: When placed, inflicts 1 Sluggish to the opposing enemy for 3 turns.

ink_trap.name: Ink Trap
ink_trap.description: When placed, inflicts Sluggish to all enemies for 3 turns.

intrepid.name: Intrepid
intrepid.description: Has Swift if there's an empty ally spot.

agile.name: Agile
agile.description: When placed, gain 1 Swift for 1 turn.

wind_of_change.name: Wind of Change
wind_of_change.description: The slowest ally on the board has Swift. If two allies are tied, they both gain Swift.

warcry.name: Warcry
warcry.description: When placed, gives Swift to its team for 1 turn.

sleep_sucker.name: Sleep Sucker
sleep_sucker.description: Regains 2 Health when dealing damage to a sleeping creature.

nightmare_fuel.name: Nightmare Fuel
nightmare_fuel.description: At the end of each turn, steals 2 Health from other sleeping creatures.

sleeping_spores.name: Sleeping Spores
sleeping_spores.description: When an enemy takes damage, inflicts 1 Torpidity to it.

sleep_trap.name: Sleep Trap
sleep_trap.description: When placed, if the opposing enemy is slower, puts it to Sleep.

restful_sleep.name: Restful Sleep
restful_sleep.description: Upon waking up, regains 2 Health and removes its negative effects.

narco_crystals.name: Narco-Crystals
narco_crystals.description: Upon losing Armor, inflicts 1 Torpidity to all enemies.

quick_fists.name: Quick Fists
quick_fists.description: When placed, inflicts 1 Torpidity to all enemies.

delicious.name: Delicious
delicious.description: On death, restores 2 Health to allies.

calcification.name: Calcification
calcification.description: Converts its excess healing into Armor.

stamina.name: Stamina
stamina.description: When an ally is placed, heal 1 Health.

venom_cure.name: Venom Cure
venom_cure.description: Poison heals this creature instead of damaging it.

crafty.name: Crafty
crafty.description: When an ally uses a status move, it regains 1 Health.

optimistic.name: Optimistic
optimistic.description: After using a move that deals 1 damage or less, heals 1 Health.

regeneration.name: Regeneration
regeneration.description: At the end of the turn, heal 1 Health.

pain_harvester.name: Pain Harvester
pain_harvester.description: When this survives damage, regains 1 Health.

undying.name: Undying
undying.description: When the creature dies, resummons itself without this talent and with half its max Health rounded up.

cowardly.name: Cowardly
cowardly.description: At the end of its turn, if it has 1 Health left, retreats.

rocky_shell.name: Rocky Shell
rocky_shell.description: Cannot die in one hit unless it only has 1 Health left. Once per battle.

leech_king.name: Leech King
leech_king.description: When an ally deals damage, it regains 1 Health.

everlasting.name: Everlasting
everlasting.description: Can be healed beyond its max Health, up to 20 Health.

impregnable_shell.name: Impregnable Shell
impregnable_shell.description: Upon receiving a negative effect, gains Protection.

fortress.name: Fortress
fortress.description: After using a status move, gains Protection.

spiky_scales.name: Spiky Scales
spiky_scales.description: When attacked, deals damage equal to this creature's Armor to the attacker.

eternal_shield.name: Eternal Shield
eternal_shield.description: Keeps up to 20 Armor on retreat and between battles.

calluses.name: Calluses
calluses.description: At the end of each turn, gains 1 Armor.

noxious_beast.name: Noxious Beast
noxious_beast.description: When a creature receives Poison, gain that much Armor.

endless_shell.name: Endless Shell
endless_shell.description: When an ally is placed, give it 2 Armor and gains 2 Armor.

venom_spray.name: Venom Spray
venom_spray.description: When placed, inflict 2 Poison to the opposing enemy.

toxic_coil.name: Toxic Coil
toxic_coil.description: At the end of each turn, inflicts 1 Poison to the opposing enemy.

venomous.name: Venomous
venomous.description: After this attacks, inflicts 1 Poison to the target.

poisoner.name: Poisoner
poisoner.description: When a creature receives Poison, gain that much Strength for 1 turn.

quick_fangs.name: Quick Fangs
quick_fangs.description: When placed and on retreat, inflicts 1 Poison to the opposing enemy.

toxic_aura.name: Toxic Aura
toxic_aura.description: When a team member deals damage, inflicts 1 Poison to the victim.

toxic_stare.name: Toxic Stare
toxic_stare.description: When placed, inflict 1 Poison to the opposing enemy.

toxic_thorns.name: Toxic Thorns
toxic_thorns.description: When attacked, inflicts 1 Poison to the attacker.

caustic.name: Caustic
caustic.description: Deals double damage to creatures that have Poison.

biohazard.name: Biohazard
biohazard.description: On death, inflicts 1 Poison to the opposing enemy.

pestiferous.name: Pestiferous
pestiferous.description: The opposing enemy's Poison increases at the end of each turn.

snowball.name: Snowball
snowball.description: When placed, inflict 1 Slowness to all enemies.

ambusher.name: Ambusher
ambusher.description: When placed, deal 1 damage to the opposing enemy.

curing_bristles.name: Curing Bristles
curing_bristles.description: When placed, removes negative effects from all allies.

charismatic.name: Charismatic
charismatic.description: On placed and on retreat, draws 1 card.

ambush_fist.name: Ambush Fist
ambush_fist.description: When placed, inflicts 2 damage and 1 Torpidity to the opposing enemy.

detection.name: Detection
detection.description: When placed, and at the end of the turn, inflicts 1 Detected to the opposing enemy.

whistly_leaves.name: Whistly Leaves
whistly_leaves.description: When placed, adds Leaf Whistle to your inventory once per battle.

gregarious.name: Gregarious
gregarious.description: On retreat, gives a copy of its positive effects to all allies.

life_drinker.name: Life Drinker
life_drinker.description: On kill, restore 1 use to its limited abilities.

pollinator.name: Pollinator
pollinator.description: On death, adds Honey into your inventory.

rock_collector.name: Rock Collector
rock_collector.description: On death, adds 1 Rock to your inventory.

reactive.name: Reactive
reactive.description: When a team member uses a status move, deal 1 damage to all enemies.

zappy.name: Zappy
zappy.description: After using a status move, deals 1 damage to the opposing enemy.

test_subject.name: Test Subject
test_subject.description: Doesn't lose its abilities that get extracted by syringes.

hypersensitive.name: Hypersensitive
hypersensitive.description: Doubles all status effects on this creature.

assimilator.name: Assimilator
assimilator.description: When placed, gains the opposing enemy's talents. Resets on retreat.

inverted_world.name: Inverted World
inverted_world.description: Reverses the attack orders of creatures within each lane.

sneaky.name: Sneaky
sneaky.description: Can be retreated without using the whistle.

metabolizer.name: Metabolizer
metabolizer.description: After eating Fish, gains a random mutation.

eerie_screech.name: Eerie Screech
eerie_screech.description: When placed, removes positive stat changes from all enemies.

thick_hide.name: Thick Hide
thick_hide.description: When about to take 4-6 damage at once, reduce it to 3.

imitator.name: Imitator
imitator.description: When placed, gain the moves of the ally to its left. Resets on retreat.

unstable_genome.name: Unstable Genome
unstable_genome.description: At the start of every other battle, gain a random mutation.

peripheral_vision.name: Peripheral Vision
peripheral_vision.description: Damage coming from other lanes is halved, rounded down.

reinvigorating.name: Reinvigorating
reinvigorating.description: When placed, restore 1 use to the limited moves of all allies. Once per battle.

opportunist.name: Opportunist
opportunist.description: Deals 3 extra damage to creatures that have negative effects.

peer_learning.name: Peer Learning
peer_learning.description: When an ally gains an effect, gains it too.

bleeding.name: Bleeding
bleeding.description: When damaged, adds Blood to your inventory. 5 uses per battle.

sonar.name: Sonar
sonar.description: The opposing enemy's talents are disabled for 5 turns this battle.

mystic_presence.name: Mystic Presence
mystic_presence.description: Doubles all stat changes of all creatures.

omnipresence.name: Omnipresence
omnipresence.description: When an ally dies, a Tentacle replaces it at the end of the turn. When an ally retreats, it gets replaced immediately.

resentful.name: Resentful
resentful.description: Upon receiving a negative effect, also inflicts it to the opposing enemy.

the_world.name: The World
the_world.description: Temporary effects don't count down at the end of the turn for everyone.

oneiric.name: Oneiric
oneiric.description: Has a random move that changes each turn.

hyperstimulation.name: Hyperstimulation
hyperstimulation.description: When placed, gains all moves of all creatures of Danger Level 4 or lower.

abyss_cure.name: Abyss Cure
abyss_cure.description: Adjacent creatures are immune to negative effects.

withering.name: Withering
withering.description: When placed, deals as much damage to the opposing enemy as it has negative effects.

ethereal.name: Ethereal
ethereal.description: On retreat, leaves behind a copy of itself. Once per battle.

ripple_effect.name: Ripple Effect
ripple_effect.description: Team members deal 3 more damage when they hit targets in other lanes.

genotoxic.name: Genotoxic
genotoxic.description: When placed, evolves its allies for the rest of the battle.

first_responder.name: First Responder
first_responder.description: Starts the battle in your hand.

gluttosis.name: Gluttosis
gluttosis.description: After eating a food, gains 1 max Health and 1 Speed forever.

tremor_sense.name: Tremor Sense
tremor_sense.description: When an enemy takes damage, inflicts Detected to it.

hardening_spores.name: Hardening Spores
hardening_spores.description: On death, gives 1 Sturdy to its team.

heavy_hitter.name: Heavy Hitter
heavy_hitter.description: For each Sturdy this has, it also has 1 Strength.

free_spirit.name: Free Spirit
free_spirit.description: Has 1 Strength and 1 Swiftness for each empty ally slot.

defiant.name: Defiant
defiant.description: Has 2 Strength, but only has one selectable move each turn. Choosen randomly.

iron_will.name: Iron Will
iron_will.description: If it has 1 Health left after surviving damage, heals back to full Health. (once per battle).

resolute.name: Resolute
resolute.description: Has Swift when it has 1 Health left.

zenkai_boost.name: Zenkai Boost
zenkai_boost.description: If healed while at 1 Health, gains 1 Strength and 1 Swiftness for each Health recovered.

disease_hunter.name: Disease Hunter
disease_hunter.description: When an enemy recieves Poison, gains 2 Swiftness.

lithophagous.name: Lithophagous
lithophagous.description: When a team member gains Armor, gains 1 Strength for 3 turns.

manner_bee.name: Manner Bee
manner_bee.description: After consuming Honey regains 1 Health and gains 3 Swiftness.

eusocial.name: Eusocial
eusocial.description: When an ally gets healed, gains 1 Strength for 1 turn.

grazer.name: Grazer
grazer.description: After consuming Medicinal Herb, regains 2 additional Health.

empathy.name: Empathy
empathy.description: When an ally is retreated, regains 1 Health.

cryo_sleep.name: Cryo-Sleep
cryo_sleep.description: When placed, falls Asleep to gain 3 Armor.

kickstart.name: Kickstart
kickstart.description: When placed, gains 1 Sturdy and 1 Swiftness for 1 turn.

fear_reflex.name: Fear Reflex
fear_reflex.description: For each Vulnerable it has, it also has Strength.

scavenger.name: Scavenger
scavenger.description: After 5 creatures die, finds an item to add to your inventory!

sclerocytes.name: Sclerocytes
sclerocytes.description: When healed, gives 1 Armor to adjacent creatures.

bug_eater.name: Bug Eater
bug_eater.description: Has 4 Swiftness if the opposing enemy has 2 Health or less.

runner.name: Runner
runner.description: When placed, gains 3 Swiftness for 2 turns.

bulwark.name: Bulwark
bulwark.description: When a team member gains Armor, it gains an extra one.

scale_shed.name: Scale Shed
scale_shed.description: When placed and on death, gives 1 armor to its allies.

leech_venom.name: Leech Venom
leech_venom.description: When Poison is inflicted, regains 1 Health.

strategic_shield.name: Strategic Shield
strategic_shield.description: After using a status move, gains 2 Armor

buboes.name: Buboes
buboes.description: After using a status move, inflicts 2 poison to the opposing enemy

hidden_stinger.name: Hidden Stinger
hidden_stinger.description: When placed, inflicts 1 Poison to all enemies.

defender.name: Defender
defender.description: The ally with least Health has 1 Sturdy.

bodyguard.name: Bodyguard
bodyguard.description: When placed, gives 2 Sturdy for 1 turn to the ally to its left.

sleepwalker.name: Sleepwaler
sleepwalker.description: Can use status moves even while Asleep

slippery.name: Slippery
slippery.description: Has 3 Swiftness if it has a negative effect.

avenger.name: Avenger
avenger.description: When anally dies, gains Swift for 4 turns.

venom_haste.name: Venom Haste
venom_haste.description: Has 5 Swiftness if the opposing enemy has Poison.

hauting_presence.name: Haunting Presence
hauting_presence.description: When placed, deals 1 damage to all enemies.

energivore.name: Energivore
energivore.description: When dealing damage, inflicts 1 Slowness to the victim and gains 1 Swiftness.

soft_body.name: Soft Body
soft_body.description: Has 4 Swiftness if it doesn't have Armor.

necrophagous.name: Necrophagous
necrophagous.description: When a creature dies, regains 2 Health.

protective_circle.name: Protective Circle
protective_circle.description: When a team member survives damage, deals 2 damage to the team member's opposing enemy.

hyperspeed.name: Hyperspeed
hyperspeed.description: At the end of each turn, gains 2 Swiftness
